Racing Games (163)

Welcome to the Racing games hub on PlayArcadeX. Here you'll find 163 free racing games — high-speed driving games featuring cars, bikes and crazy tracks, where the fastest and most fearless driver takes the win. Popular picks right now include Car Eats Car: Dungeon Adventure, Mad Day Special, Drift Car Driving, Rally Race Pro 3.0 Car Racing and Vehicle Masters. Every game runs straight in your browser, with no download, no installation and no sign-up. Just click and play on your phone, tablet or computer.

About Racing Games

Racing games are high-speed driving games featuring cars, bikes and crazy tracks, where the fastest and most fearless driver takes the win. On PlayArcadeX we keep this collection fresh, adding new racing titles regularly so there's always something new to try. Whether you have five minutes or an hour, you'll find a racing game here that fits.

All 163 racing games on this page are completely free and work on both desktop and mobile. If you enjoy racing games, bookmark this page and check back often — the lineup keeps growing.

Frequently Asked Questions

Are these Racing games free to play?

Yes. Every racing game on PlayArcadeX is 100% free to play, with no download, no installation and no payment required. Just open a game and start playing.

Can I play Racing games on mobile?

Absolutely. All racing games here run directly in your mobile browser on Android and iOS, as well as on tablets and desktop computers — no app needed.

What are the best Racing games to start with?

Great starting points include Car Eats Car: Dungeon Adventure, Mad Day Special, Drift Car Driving. From there, browse the full list of 163 racing games above and find your favourites.
